title: cyclosorus scallanii
intro: Cyclosorus scallanii, also known as Scallania, is a type of fern found in tropical regions of Asia. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues and skin conditions. The plant is believed to have anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of bronchitis, coughs, and skin irritations. In herbal preparations, Cyclosorus scallanii can be found in teas, infusions, or tinctures, often combined with other herbs to enhance its health benefits.
